abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} and burn momentum to improve your result, mark progress twice. If the fight continues, add +1 on your next move.

When you @UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} and score a strong hit, add +1 if you immediately follow with a @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike}.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} with an act of fealty by kneeling and firmly grasping your sword’s blade so that it draws blood, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-1). You may then reroll one challenge die.
